creator: as@cmplx.uk
text:
I build sysutils/qzeitgeist with poudriere-devel.

I get to:

[ 82%] Built target qzeitgeist
/usr/bin/make -f declarative/CMakeFiles/QZeitgeistDeclarativePlugin_automoc.dir/build.make declarati
ve/CMakeFiles/QZeitgeistDeclarativePlugin_automoc.dir/depend
cd /wrkdirs/usr/ports/sysutils/qzeitgeist/work/libqzeitgeist-0.8.0 && /usr/local/bin/cmake -E cmake_
depends "Unix Makefiles" /wrkdirs/usr/ports/sysutils/qzeitgeist/work/libqzeitgeist-0.8.0 /wrkdirs/us
r/ports/sysutils/qzeitgeist/work/libqzeitgeist-0.8.0/declarative /wrkdirs/usr/ports/sysutils/qzeitge
ist/work/libqzeitgeist-0.8.0 /wrkdirs/usr/ports/sysutils/qzeitgeist/work/libqzeitgeist-0.8.0/declara
tive /wrkdirs/usr/ports/sysutils/qzeitgeist/work/libqzeitgeist-0.8.0/declarative/CMakeFiles/QZeitgei
stDeclarativePlugin_automoc.dir/DependInfo.cmake
Scanning dependencies of target QZeitgeistDeclarativePlugin_automoc
/usr/bin/make -f declarative/CMakeFiles/QZeitgeistDeclarativePlugin_automoc.dir/build.make declarati
ve/CMakeFiles/QZeitgeistDeclarativePlugin_automoc.dir/build
cd /wrkdirs/usr/ports/sysutils/qzeitgeist/work/libqzeitgeist-0.8.0/declarative && /usr/local/bin/aut
omoc4 /wrkdirs/usr/ports/sysutils/qzeitgeist/work/libqzeitgeist-0.8.0/declarative/QZeitgeistDeclarat
ivePlugin_automoc.cpp /wrkdirs/usr/ports/sysutils/qzeitgeist/work/libqzeitgeist-0.8.0/declarative /w
rkdirs/usr/ports/sysutils/qzeitgeist/work/libqzeitgeist-0.8.0/declarative /usr/local/bin/moc-qt4 /us
r/local/bin/cmake
Generating plugin.moc
*** Signal 11

The full build log:

http://eis.bris.ac.uk/~mexas/qzeitgeist-0.8.0.log

I think this might be an intermittent error.
I need to check, but I think it fails in different
places from one build to the next.
